uplink.description: Status report, leak detected, low battery, shock/tamper alarm
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected normalized data derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.0 low battery, WaterLeak Leak, ShockTamperAlarm Alarm).

uplink.description: Status report, no leak, normal battery, shock/tamper alarm
uplink._note: TTN-example input; expected normalized data derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 12.0, WaterLeak noLeak, ShockTamperAlarm Alarm).
TTN-example input; upstream decodes this as a version/datecode report with no measurement.

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort (config response on fPort 23) carries no measurement
uplink._note: TTN-example input; fPort 23 is the config-response channel, not a measurement.
